duplicate_suffix_label_body_unresolved.description: Duplicate body/suffix labels block body selection before count-policy selection.

length2_filter_at_most_once.description: Length-2 rare body is treated as noise and repeated loops are invalid.

length2_filter_unbounded.description: Length-2 rare body is filtered while repeated dominant loops are valid.

length2_keep_all_at_most_once.description: Length-2 rare body is valid, but repeated loop iterations are invalid.

length2_keep_all_unbounded.description: Length-2 rare body is valid and repeated loops are valid.

length3_body_body_unresolved.description: Length-3 body alternatives exceed the upstream fixed body-length bound.

mixed_width_length2_dominant_filter_at_m.description: Rare singleton body is filtered and repeated dominant length-2 loops are invalid.

mixed_width_length2_dominant_filter_unbo.description: Rare singleton body is filtered while repeated dominant length-2 loops are valid.

mixed_width_length2_dominant_keep_all_at.description: Rare singleton body is valid, but repeated loop iterations are invalid.

mixed_width_length2_dominant_keep_all_un.description: Dominant length-2 and rare singleton body are both valid with unbounded repeat.

mixed_width_singleton_dominant_filter_at.description: Dominant singleton remains valid, rare length-2 body and repeated loops are rejected.

mixed_width_singleton_dominant_filter_un.description: Mixed singleton/length-2 rare body is noise while repeated dominant loops are valid.

mixed_width_singleton_dominant_keep_all_.description: Mixed singleton/length-2 rare body is valid, but repeated loop iterations are invalid.
Dominant singleton and rare length-2 body are both valid with unbounded repeat.

one_iteration_only_body_unresolved.description: One-iteration-only evidence does not expose body or count alternatives.

overlapping_body_labels_body_unresolved.description: Overlapping body labels block upstream body-policy evidence.

rare_count_two_configured_filter_unbound.description: Configured rare-count-two policy filters a count-two rare body, while count validation selects unbounded repeat.

rare_count_two_configured_keep_all_at_mo.description: Configured rare-count-two policy can still be overridden when validation requires the rare body.

rare_count_two_default_body_unresolved.description: Default rare-count-one support guard cannot filter a count-two rare body.

two_rare_count_two_one_valid_one_noise_u.description: Group count-two filtering cannot keep one rare body while filtering another.
